---
title: "Routes"
format: dashboard
---

<style>
.desktop-only {
  display: block;
}

.mobile-only {
  display: none;
}

.mobile-route-grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.9rem;
}

.mobile-route-controls {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
}

.mobile-route-control {
  min-width: 0;
}

.mobile-route-controls label {
  display: block;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
}

.mobile-route-card {
  border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
  border-radius: 0.85rem;
  padding: 0.95rem 1rem 0.85rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
}

.mobile-route-title {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0.65rem;
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.25;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.mobile-route-title a {
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.mobile-route-title a:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

.mobile-route-elevation {
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}

.mobile-route-elevation svg {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  max-height: 18vh;
}

.mobile-route-metrics {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 0.65rem 0.9rem;
}

.mobile-route-metrics p {
  margin: 0;
  line-height: 1.25;
}

.mobile-route-label {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.03em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.62);
}

@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .desktop-only {
    display: none;
  }

  .mobile-only {
    display: block;
  }
}
</style>

## Snapshot

### Route Summaries

::: {.desktop-only}
```{=html}

<script type="module">

          "classes": ["display", "nowrap", "compact"],

          "data_json": "[[\"<a href=\\\"routes/tg-bbr-loop.html\\\">Trestle Glen to BBR Loop</a>\", \"19th St/Oakland\", [\"19.87\", 19.87], [\"2099.41\", 2099.41], [\"1.16\", 1.16], [\"0.52\", 0.52]], [\"<a href=\\\"routes/arlington-gravel-loop.html\\\">Arlington Gravel Loop</a>\", \"El Cerrito del Norte\", [\"14.89\", 14.89], [\"1761.81\", 1761.81], [\"0.58\", 0.58], [\"0.15\", 0.15]], [\"<a href=\\\"routes/wildcat-conlon-nimitz-meadow-loop.html\\\">Alvarado to Tilden via Conlon Trail</a>\", \"El Cerrito del Norte\", [\"18.05\", 18.05], [\"2057.41\", 2057.41], [\"1.24\", 1.24], [\"0.33\", 0.33]], [\"<a href=\\\"routes/wildcat-havey-nimitz-meadow-loop.html\\\">Alvarado to Tilden via Havey Canyon</a>\", \"El Cerrito del Norte\", [\"18.83\", 18.83], [\"1875.66\", 1875.66], [\"0.97\", 0.97], [\"0.19\", 0.19]], [\"<a href=\\\"routes/three-bears-gravel-loop.html\\\">Three Wild Bears w/ Gravel</a>\", \"El Cerrito del Norte\", [\"32.49\", 32.49], [\"3171.59\", 3171.59], [\"1.36\", 1.36], [\"0.20\", 0.2]], [\"<a href=\\\"routes/tunnel-to-claremont-loop.html\\\">Tunnel Road to Claremont Loop</a>\", \"MacArthur\", [\"14.16\", 14.16], [\"1502.30\", 1502.3], [\"0.74\", 0.74], [\"0.19\", 0.19]], [\"<a href=\\\"routes/wildwood-bbr-loop.html\\\">Wildwood to BBR Loop</a>\", \"MacArthur\", [\"17.41\", 17.41], [\"2245.08\", 2245.08], [\"1.32\", 1.32], [\"0.38\", 0.38]], [\"<a href=\\\"routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-jm.html\\\">Tunnel to Pinehurst w/ Joaquin Miller Descent</a>\", \"MacArthur\", [\"25.09\", 25.09], [\"3021.65\", 3021.65], [\"1.92\", 1.92], [\"0.66\", 0.66]], [\"<a href=\\\"routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-sheps.html\\\">Tunnel to Pinehurst w/ Shepards Canyon Descent</a>\", \"MacArthur\", [\"27.96\", 27.96], [\"3127.62\", 3127.62], [\"2.24\", 2.24], [\"0.67\", 0.67]], [\"<a href=\\\"routes/spruce-up-euclid-down.html\\\">Spruce up, Euclid Down</a>\", \"North Berkeley\", [\"11.59\", 11.59], [\"1062.34\", 1062.34], [\"0.28\", 0.28], [\"0.11\", 0.11]], [\"<a href=\\\"routes/grizzly-peak-loop.html\\\">Grizzly Peak Loop</a>\", \"North Berkeley\", [\"13.91\", 13.91], [\"1459.97\", 1459.97], [\"0.32\", 0.32], [\"0.11\", 0.11]], [\"<a href=\\\"routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop.html\\\">Tunnel to Pinehurst Loop</a>\", \"Rockridge\", [\"22.63\", 22.63], [\"3002.30\", 3002.3], [\"1.92\", 1.92], [\"0.71\", 0.71]], [\"<a href=\\\"routes/redwood-san-leandro-macarthur-bart.html\\\">Redwood Road, San Lorenzo to Temescal</a>\", \"San Leandro\", [\"24.55\", 24.55], [\"2641.08\", 2641.08], [\"1.19\", 1.19], [\"0.38\", 0.38]]]",
          "keys_to_be_evaluated": [["columnDefs", 0, "render"]],
          "layout": {"bottomEnd": "paging", "bottomStart": "info", "topEnd": null, "topStart": "search"},
          "order": [[2, "desc"]],
          "paging": false,
          "scrollCollapse": true,
          "scrollY": "72vh",
          "style": {"width": "100%"},
          "table_html": "<table><thead>\n    <tr style=\"text-align: right;\">\n      \n      <th>Route</th>\n      <th>BART</th>\n      <th>Miles</th>\n      <th>Elevation Gain (ft)</th>\n      <th>Steep Climbing Miles</th>\n      <th>Dangerous Descent Miles</th>\n    </tr>\n  </thead></table>",
          "text_in_header_can_be_selected": true
        };
        new ITable(table, dt_args);
    });
</script>

```
:::

::: {.mobile-only}
```{=html}
<div class="mobile-route-controls">
<div class="mobile-route-control">
<label for="mobile-route-sort">Sort routes</label>
<select id="mobile-route-sort" class="form-select">
<option value="miles_asc">Miles: shortest</option>
<option value="miles_desc">Miles: longest</option>
<option value="elev_asc">Elevation: lowest</option>
<option value="elev_desc">Elevation: highest</option>
</select>
</div>
<div class="mobile-route-control">
<label for="mobile-route-bart">BART station</label>
<select id="mobile-route-bart" class="form-select">
<option value="">All stations</option>
<option value="San Leandro">San Leandro</option>
<option value="Rockridge">Rockridge</option>
<option value="MacArthur">MacArthur</option>
<option value="19th St/Oakland">19th St/Oakland</option>
<option value="North Berkeley">North Berkeley</option>
<option value="El Cerrito del Norte">El Cerrito del Norte</option>
</select>
</div>
</div>
<div class="mobile-route-grid" id="mobile-route-grid">
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="North Berkeley" data-miles="11.59" data-elevation="1062.34">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/spruce-up-euclid-down.html">Spruce up, Euclid Down</a></p>

</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="North Berkeley" data-miles="13.91" data-elevation="1459.97">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/grizzly-peak-loop.html">Grizzly Peak Loop</a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" standalone="no"?>
<!DOCTYPE svg PUBLIC "-//W3C//DTD SVG 1.1//EN"
  "http://www.w3.org/Graphics/SVG/1.1/DTD/svg11.dtd">
<svg xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" width="223.2pt" height="55.44pt" viewBox="0 0 223.2 55.44" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" version="1.1">

<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="MacArthur" data-miles="14.16" data-elevation="1502.30">

<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="MacArthur" data-miles="17.41" data-elevation="2245.08">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/wildwood-bbr-loop.html">Wildwood to BBR Loop</a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" standalone="no"?>
<!DOCTYPE svg PUBLIC "-//W3C//DTD SVG 1.1//EN"
  "http://www.w3.org/Graphics/SVG/1.1/DTD/svg11.dtd">
<svg xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" width="223.2pt" height="55.44pt" viewBox="0 0 223.2 55.44" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" version="1.1">
 <metadata>
  <rdf:RDF xmlns:dc="http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/" xmlns:cc="http://creativecommons.org/ns#" xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#">
   <cc:Work>
    <dc:type rdf:resource="http://purl.org/dc/dcmitype/StillImage"/>
    <dc:date>2026-05-06T12:59:52.434407</dc:date>
    <dc:format>image/svg+xml</dc:format>

</div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>MacArthur</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>17.41</p>

</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="El Cerrito del Norte" data-miles="18.05" data-elevation="2057.41">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/wildcat-conlon-nimitz-meadow-loop.html">Alvarado to Tilden via Conlon Trail</a></p>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" standalone="no"?>

</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="El Cerrito del Norte" data-miles="18.83" data-elevation="1875.66">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/wildcat-havey-nimitz-meadow-loop.html">Alvarado to Tilden via Havey Canyon</a></p>

<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>El Cerrito del Norte</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>18.83</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>1875.66 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Tech Descents</span><br>0.19 mi</p>
</div>
</article>
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="19th St/Oakland" data-miles="19.87" data-elevation="2099.41">

<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="San Leandro" data-miles="24.55" data-elevation="2641.08">
<p class="mobile-route-title"><a style="color:DodgerBlue;" href="routes/redwood-san-leandro-macarthur-bart.html">Redwood Road, San Lorenzo to Temescal</a></p>

<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="MacArthur" data-miles="27.96" data-elevation="3127.62">

<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="El Cerrito del Norte" data-miles="32.49" data-elevation="3171.59">

" clip-path="url(#pb18c6ee6bd)" style="fill: none; stroke-dasharray: 2,3.3; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke: #8d99ae; stroke-opacity: 0.7; stroke-width: 2"/>

 <defs>
  <clipPath id="pb18c6ee6bd">
   <rect x="0" y="-0" width="223.2" height="55.44"/>
  </clipPath>
 </defs>
</svg>
</div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>El Cerrito del Norte</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>32.49</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>3171.59 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Tech Descents</span><br>0.2 mi</p>
</div>
</article>
</div>
```
:::

```{=html}
<script>
window.addEventListener("load", function () {
  const sortSelect = document.getElementById("mobile-route-sort");
  const bartSelect = document.getElementById("mobile-route-bart");
  const grid = document.getElementById("mobile-route-grid");
  if (!sortSelect || !bartSelect || !grid) {
    return;
  }

  const sorters = {
    miles_asc: (a, b) => Number(a.dataset.miles) - Number(b.dataset.miles),
    miles_desc: (a, b) => Number(b.dataset.miles) - Number(a.dataset.miles),
    elev_asc: (a, b) => Number(a.dataset.elevation) - Number(b.dataset.elevation),
    elev_desc: (a, b) => Number(b.dataset.elevation) - Number(a.dataset.elevation)
  };

  function applyMobileControls() {
    const cards = Array.from(grid.querySelectorAll(".mobile-route-card"));
    const bart = bartSelect.value;
    cards.forEach((card) => {
      const visible = !bart || card.dataset.bart === bart;
      card.style.display = visible ? "" : "none";
    });
    const sorter = sorters[sortSelect.value] || sorters.miles_asc;
    cards.sort(sorter);
    cards.forEach((card) => grid.appendChild(card));
  }

  sortSelect.addEventListener("change", applyMobileControls);
  bartSelect.addEventListener("change", applyMobileControls);
});
</script>
```
